turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good afternoon , beverly . good to see beverly .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nice to see the doctor too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , the doctor know the doctor's nurse told beverly a little bit about dax . um , now , if beverly do n't mind , the doctor 'd like to tell dax a little bit about beverly .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: go for it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: great . um , beverly's a 24 year old female patient , and the doctor know beverly have a history of type 2 diabetes and high blood pressure . correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yep .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so , beverly 're here today for beverly's yearly exam . have n't seen beverly in a year . how're beverly doing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: beverly've been doing well . beverly began working in a bakery this summer which has been super fun. beverly have really been enjoying working there, but beverly find beverlyself, since beverly am so close to so many delicious treats, snacking a lot during shifts and eating a lot more desserts than beverly normally would.

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so , that brings the doctor to beverly's diabetes . so , how have beverly's blood sugars been ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , not so good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so , beverly's blood sugars have been up and down because of beverly's diet , beverly think , because beverly've been taking beverly's medication as prescribed . um , so , beverly have n't missed anything there , but beverly's diet has been pretty bad lately .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: pretty bad lately ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and , that's really the only thing that's different is beverly's diet , pretty much ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and , that's because of the new job and all that ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah. beverly's diet has been really challenging to resist the temptation.

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: it's hard to ignore those desserts , are n't those desserts ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: no willpower like the doctor ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , no willpower .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and , and then , um , the doctor know beverly've had high blood pressure , hypertension . how is , how have beverly's blood sugars been ? have beverly been checking beverly's blood sugars ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so , beverly's blood pressure's been good . um , despite beverly's , um , beverly's diabetes levels being up and down .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so , beverly's blood pressure has been good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so , beverly's blood pressures have been normal . have beverly been sleeping well ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yep , getting a full eight hours .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: no concerns about beverly hurting beverlyself or anything like that ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , good . okay , and the doctor know the doctor's , um , nurse did a review of systems . other than what the doctor and beverly've talked about so far , is there anything else that beverly needed to add ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good . so , pretty much status quo except for those things that the doctor and beverly've been working on , right ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yep .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , good . all right . well , let the doctor do a quick physical exam , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , squeeze the doctor's finger here . good . can beverly feel the doctor touch out here ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yep .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and , can beverly feel the doctor touch beverly down here ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yep .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . no swelling . push beverly's leg out . good . pull beverly's leg back . mm-hmm . go . good . okay . so , on the doctor's exam , um , essentially , beverly's exam is normal . beverly's , um , heart is regular . beverly do have that grade 2 , um , systolic ejection fraction back ejection murmur that beverly , um , that the doctor and beverly've heard in the past . okay ? so , um , the doctor definitely know the grade 2 systolic ejection fraction back ejection murmur is there . the grade 2 systolic ejection fraction back ejection murmur is unchanged , okay ? um , beverly's lungs are clear . um , beverly's grips are equal . neurovascular's intact . beverly do n't have any carotid bruits in beverly's neck , no thyromegaly . no edema . um , pulses are good , so essentially , beverly's exam is , is essentially normal . let's take a look at some of beverly's lab work , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , show the doctor the hemoglobin a1c . okay , so , blood sugars have been elevated . beverly's hemoglobin a1c is elevated as well , so the elevated hemoglobin a1c tells the doctor beverly's blood sugars have been a little bit out of control . beverly're still taking the metformin , correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , beverly am .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and beverly take metformin twice a day ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yep .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . um , uh , hey , dragon ? show the doctor the vital signs . okay , good news here is beverly's blood pressure's good . everything , um , in the vital signs is fine . so , um , so , the doctor's assessment is , is , um , beverly's first problem is diabetes . diabetes is a little out of control . the doctor 'd like beverly's hemoglobin a1c to be under seven , um , at least . the doctor know , preferably , beverly's hemoglobin a1c under six .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , um , uh , the doctor 'm not gon na change beverly's medication . the doctor think diabetes is diet related , so the doctor want beverly to try to cut down on the snacking and additional sweets , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and , the doctor want beverly to check beverly's blood sugars in the morning . the doctor want beverly to call the blood sugar readings in in about two weeks so the doctor know what beverly's first , um , fasting blood sugar was in the morning , and then , the doctor and beverly'll come back and see beverly in about two months and see if everything has straightened out . if everything has straightened out has n't , then the doctor and beverly'll talk about adding another medication , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: beverly's second problem is beverly's hypertension . hypertension seems to be relatively stable . the doctor want beverly to stay on beverly's current medication . beverly're on li- lisinopril 10 mg once a day . just stay right on lisinopril 10 mg once a day . no changes at this point . lisinopril 10 mg once a day seems to be doing well , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good . anything else the doctor can do for beverly today ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no . that's it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good . come with the doctor , the doctor 'll get beverly checked out .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: thank the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon ? finalize the note .
